libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Consume the requested BOM coordinate as a Gradle platform/POM import, not as a normal jar dependency. Tests should focus on stable in-process OpenTelemetry instrumentation APIs and avoid attaching or executing the javaagent.

deterministic_setup.reason: The BOM only provides dependency management for OpenTelemetry instrumentation modules; this managed API module supplies actual classes and normal library APIs that can be exercised in JVM and native-image tests.

risks: The BOM itself has no bytecode, so reachability metadata and dynamic-access coverage for the BOM coordinate may remain empty or not meaningful.
If the scaffold cannot represent the requested coordinate as a platform dependency, local Gradle verification may fail before test generation is useful.
Coverage from the added module primarily validates a BOM-managed artifact rather than the BOM artifact itself.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The requested artifact is a BOM/POM-only platform with no jar or classes, so the normal scaffold cannot reach meaningful runtime coverage without adding a real BOM-managed module to exercise.
